name: Purchasing & Stock Receipt - Integration & API Summary
body: [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "This guide outlines how to integrate with Retail Express to manage Purchase Orders, Purchase Order Receipts, and Supplier Invoices that are created and actioned using the Purchase Order 2.0 (modern) functionality in Retail Express. These entities work together to support a complete stock ordering and receiving workflow."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "Overview"}], "data-id": "overview"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Retail Express uses three core entities to manage stock procurement:"}]}, {"type": "ul", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Purchase Orders", "bold": true}, {"text": ": The initial order sent to the supplier."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Purchase Order Receipts", "bold": true}, {"text": ": Records of stock received against a Purchase Order, including item-level pricing and costs."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Supplier Invoices", "bold": true}, {"text": ": Financial records from the supplier, including total costs, tax, and currency conversion."}]}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h3", "children": [{"text": "Relationships"}], "data-id": "relationships"}, {"type": "ul", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "One-to-One", "bold": true}, {"text": ": Each Purchase Order Receipt is linked to a single Supplier Invoice."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "One-to-Many", "bold": true}, {"text": ": A single Purchase Order can have multiple Receipts and Supplier Invoices."}]}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Direct Costs", "bold": true}]}, {"type": "ul", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Costs are distributed across items in the associated Purchase Order Receipt."}]}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "Workflow Examples"}], "data-id": "workflow-examples"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Retail Express supports multiple workflows for managing Purchase Orders and Receipts:"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h3", "children": [{"text": "1. Create Purchase Order, Receive and Finalise"}], "data-id": "1-create-purchase-order-receive-and-finalise"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h3", "children": [{"text": "2. Status options: Incomplete (5), On-Order (6), Back-Order (9)."}]}]}]}, {"type": "tr", "children": [{"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "PUT /purchaseorders/{id}", "code": true}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Update Purchase Order status. Required for creating Receipts."}]}]}]}, {"type": "tr", "children": [{"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "PUT /purchaseorders/{id}/purchaseorderitems/{id}", "code": true}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Update item details."}]}]}]}, {"type": "tr", "children": [{"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "PUT /purchaseorders/{id}/purchaseorderitems/{id}/cancel", "code": true}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Cancel remaining quantity.
